title: library
text: library A main development object that contains a collection of objects of the same type, which are shared across the application. Runtime Libraries contain global objects such as menus, global constants, and global ProcScripts. Development libraries contain modeled properties, IncludeScripts, and snippets. Related Links Library A Library is a Main Development Object that holds a collection of objects of the same type that can be accessed or reused by other objects, either during development or at runtime.
